categories.name: ADD_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Application is open at its main list/collection screen and the target container (list/category/folder) is reachable from the main navigation
abstract_steps: Navigate to the target container if entries are scoped to one
Invoke the primary create affordance (typically a floating add control or compose control)
Choose the entry subtype/variant if multiple are offered
Focus the title/name field and enter the required text, replacing any default placeholder explicitly
Focus secondary fields (body, metadata, description) and fill required values
Open and configure structured pickers (date, time, recurrence, reminder, priority, tags, location, category/color) via their respective rows
For each property choose either a quick preset or open an advanced picker
Confirm each picker sub-dialog
Persist via explicit save/confirm control or by exiting the editor (auto-save)
Dismiss any post-save warning/disclaimer dialogs
failure_modes: Tapping placeholder text that isn't interactive instead of using the primary create affordance
Typing before the input field is focused so text is dropped or goes into wrong widget
Creating in the wrong container because navigation was skipped
Selecting wrong subtype (e.g., note vs task, file vs folder, regular vs quick)
Missing required configuration that blocks save
Default placeholder name conflicts with an existing entry causing silent failure
Typing without first replacing the default leads to concatenated values
Tapping outside an open menu dismisses it instead of selecting an option
Forgetting to dismiss a post-save dialog leaves entry uncommitted
Default values (date/time/reminder) not changed to match the requested values
Imprecise taps on circular pickers select neighboring values
Pressing back before saving discards the entry
Quick presets not matching the required value, requiring advanced picker
24-hour vs 12-hour confusion when entering times
verification_checklist: New entry visible in the target container's list at the correct slot
Title and content match the requested values
Subtype indicator (e.g., checkbox for tasks) is correct
No error/toast indicating save failure
No duplicate-name error dialogs are present
All requested attributes match when entry is reopened
No leftover blocking dialog remains on screen
Displayed metadata (date/time/priority badges) matches input
Reopening the entry shows all configured fields persisted

categories.name: EDIT_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Target entry exists and can be opened from a list or reached via search
abstract_steps: Locate the entry via list scroll or text search
Open the entry to viewer/detail mode (avoiding completion/delete affordances)
Switch to edit mode via edit affordance
Position cursor at the desired location (end of text for append, select all for replace)
If replacing content, select all existing content and delete it
Insert formatting markers BEFORE typing text where toolbar buttons may misbehave
Type or replace text, using underlying markup directly when toolbar buttons split across lines
Adjust structured pickers as required
Confirm any sub-dialogs that appear
Persist changes via the explicit save control or by exiting editor
failure_modes: Cursor lands inside an existing word leading to corrupted text
Typing inserts instead of replacing when text isn't selected
Edit mode not entered so input is ignored
Accidentally opening wrong entry with similar name
Toolbar formatting buttons insert on new line, splitting the intended single-line entry
Autocorrect/auto-list continuation causes duplicated prefixes
Saving forgotten, leaving unsaved-changes indicator active
Typing into a field without selecting existing text causes concatenation
Stale cached lists do not reflect the change visually until reopened
Save action overlaps with a dialog that must be dismissed first
Tapping the wrong row item (e.g., adjacent entry) opens incorrect detail
Tapping a status checkbox marks complete instead of opening detail
Unsaved changes lost when navigating back without confirmation
verification_checklist: Viewer/detail mode shows updated text
No leftover artifacts from previous content
Entry still exists in the same container
Rendered/raw content matches the requested formatting
Save indicator returns to a neutral state (e.g., disabled/greyed)
Reopening the entry shows the persisted/updated values
Overview/list view badges update to reflect changes (e.g., new color/label/time)
No unsaved-changes prompt appears on subsequent navigation

categories.name: DELETE_OR_COMPLETE_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Entry/task is visible in a list and supports a completion or delete action, or can be opened to its detail screen
abstract_steps: Locate target via scroll or search
Tap the dedicated completion checkbox/status toggle, or open detail and use the delete control
For bulk delete: enter multi-select mode via long-press on a target, tap each additional matching item, scroll to confirm no further matches are hidden below the fold
Invoke delete and confirm in the confirmation dialog
If multiple items, repeat for each
failure_modes: List reorders after each action causing misclicks on next item
Filter hides completed items immediately, making verification harder
Tapping the row instead of the checkbox opens the entry
Tap location too close to text opens detail instead of toggling
Bulk operations require menu access not always discoverable
Missing items hidden by scroll
Accidentally selecting non-matching items
Dismissing the confirmation dialog instead of confirming
Deleting a different occurrence when the entry is recurring
verification_checklist: Checkbox shows checked state or item removed from active list
Item count decreased as expected
Entry disappears from active list or appears struck-through in completed section
Confirmation toast displayed
Target items no longer appear in the list
No remaining items match the deletion criterion
No error toast displayed
Search by its identifier returns no result

categories.name: RENAME_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Entry is selectable in a list
abstract_steps: Select the entry to expose contextual actions
Open the rename control
Explicitly select-all current text before typing the new name
Confirm the rename
failure_modes: New text is prepended/appended because old text was not fully selected
Forgetting required file extension
verification_checklist: Entry now displays the exact new name including extension
No conflict dialog appears

categories.name: QUERY_INFO
categories.precondition: Data of interest exists somewhere in the app and is browsable or searchable
abstract_steps: Navigate to the relevant section/view (date, settings page, collection screen, etc.) or use search
Use search or scroll to locate target/matching entries
Open entry if needed to read full content or hidden fields
Read the displayed value verbatim from list row or detail
Aggregate (count/sum/extract) the requested field/value across scrolled views carefully to avoid double counting
Return the answer in the requested format
failure_modes: Mis-counting items by confusing similar subtypes
Scrolling past target items
Reading a stale cached view
Opening the entry instead of reading list-level metadata
Confusing similar-looking fields
Truncated labels in compact views hide full text; need detail/search view
Scrollable lists may have items off-screen; failing to scroll causes undercount
Confusing similar items (e.g., events spanning midnight assigned to wrong day)
Over- or under-counting due to large scroll jumps
Confusing similar-looking date labels (relative vs absolute)
Treating completed/struck-through entries as active or vice versa
verification_checklist: Answer matches text visible on screen
Distinguished correct subtype (e.g., task vs note) when relevant
Answer formatting matches the prompt's expectation
All matching items inspected via scroll/search
Scrolled through entire list at least once in both directions
Distinct entries counted exactly once

categories.name: NAVIGATE_TO
categories.precondition: Device home screen, another app, or current app state from which target screen/date is reachable
abstract_steps: Verify target app identity before launching (icon ambiguity is common)
Return to home if necessary
Open the all-apps drawer if the target app is not pinned
Scroll to find target app (alphabetical)
Launch the target app and wait for splash to settle, verifying its label
Open primary navigation (drawer/menu) or use bottom navigation / top menu
Use header pickers, arrow controls, or search to jump to the target container/section/date
Prefer direct taps over swipes inside dialog pickers
Select target container or section and confirm navigation (e.g., OK)
Confirm header/title matches target
failure_modes: Tapping wrong icon (top-right vs top-left)
Opening a similarly named item by accident
Launching a visually similar but different app
Acting on splash screen before UI is interactive
Assuming a feature exists under a menu that only holds unrelated entries
Swipe gestures inside picker dialogs dismiss them
Multiple consecutive month navigations are slow vs. using a year/month picker
Splash screen still loading - need to wait
Network/sync errors blocking initial entry
verification_checklist: Header reflects target name
Expected list/content for that section is visible
App title/header matches the intended app
The active tab/section indicator highlights the target screen
Expected screen-specific controls are visible
App's main screen rendered with expected widgets
Subsequent operations occur in the correct context

categories.name: CONFIGURE_VIEW
categories.precondition: On a list/main screen that supports view options (sort/group/filter affordances)
abstract_steps: Open the sort/filter/view configuration affordance (often a dedicated icon, not the overflow menu)
Tap the dimension to change (grouping / sorting / completed sorting)
Select the desired sort key or option from the option sheet
Toggle direction, visibility flags, or boolean preferences (e.g., move-completed-to-bottom) as needed
Close menu and verify list reflects settings
failure_modes: Forgetting to disable reverse-order toggle
Looking for options in global settings rather than list view
Menu closes after one selection requiring reopening
Confusing overflow menu with sort menu
Selection not registering and needing a retry
Settings scoped per-list and not global
verification_checklist: List ordering matches desired key/direction
Visibility toggles produce the expected filtered list
Reopening the menu confirms persisted selections
Configuration sheet displays the chosen labels
List visibly re-orders/regroups to reflect selection

categories.name: CONFIGURE_SETTINGS
abstract_steps: Open the overflow/options menu and enter Settings (gear or equivalent)
Drill into the appropriate category, scrolling if needed
Select the target setting and choose the desired value from the dialog
Toggle/select the new value
Verify the change persists
failure_modes: Looking for the setting under an unrelated category
Closing the dialog without selecting
Setting hidden behind a parent option (e.g., theme must be 'Custom' to expose color choices)
Tap registers on adjacent option due to dense layout
verification_checklist: Updated value displayed beneath the setting name
Setting visually reflects the new state
Behavior change observed on next relevant action/launch

categories.name: CREATE_CONTAINER
abstract_steps: Open navigation drawer or relevant management screen
Invoke 'create new container' action
Enter container name
Save
failure_modes: Required dependent settings missing (e.g., region/language) blocking creation
Container created but not auto-selected, causing subsequent items to land in wrong place
verification_checklist: New container appears in list
Subsequent additions show inside it

categories.name: MANAGE_CATEGORY
abstract_steps: Navigate into the category management screen
Add a new category or edit an existing one
Set its name and visual attribute (e.g., color via preset or hex)
Save and verify presence in the list
failure_modes: Closing the dialog without selecting a color leaves default
Saving without filling required name field
verification_checklist: Category appears with correct name and color
Category can be assigned to entries

categories.name: ATTACH_MEDIA
categories.precondition: Editor supports media attachment and external camera/gallery is available
abstract_steps: Tap the media/attach control
Choose source (camera vs gallery)
Configure capture options if needed
Confirm and return to editor
Save entry
failure_modes: Permission dialogs interrupt flow
Accidentally tapping image area dismisses or opens unintended picker
Source returns no recent items
verification_checklist: Media preview visible in editor
Entry saved with media attached

categories.name: ATTACH_LOCATION
categories.precondition: In editor with location field; device supports map services
abstract_steps: Open location picker
Center map on current position or search
Grant location permission if requested
Accept any certificate or trust prompts
Confirm selection
failure_modes: Map fails to load due to untrusted certificate
Permission denial blocks current-location fix
Internal errors after selection require retrying
verification_checklist: Address text appears in the editor's location row
Map reopens with same pin if revisited

categories.name: SET_REMINDER
abstract_steps: Open entry options/overflow menu
Select alarm/reminder option
Pick date and time
Confirm/save the alarm
Grant notification permission if prompted
failure_modes: Skipping permission grant means alarms won't fire
Confusing date confirmation with final save
verification_checklist: Alarm indicator visible on entry
System permission granted

categories.name: SET_DATE_TIME
categories.precondition: In an editor with a date/time row
abstract_steps: Open the date/time picker via the date row
Choose a date via calendar navigation or preset
Choose a time via preset, analog clock, or keyboard-numeric entry
Account for 24-hour clock when converting AM/PM
Confirm sub-dialogs in order (time then combined date+time)
failure_modes: Selecting AM time when PM intended
Picker dialog confirmations skipped, losing selection
Calendar arrow navigation overshooting target month
verification_checklist: Editor row shows the selected absolute date and time
Reopening the picker shows the same selection highlighted

categories.name: SET_CUSTOM_RECURRENCE
categories.precondition: In an editor where simple presets are insufficient
abstract_steps: Open recurrence menu and choose Custom
Set numeric interval, carefully handling text-field editing
Choose unit (day/week/month/year)
Select specific days of week or month if applicable
Choose end condition (never, on date, after N occurrences)
Apply via back/confirm control
failure_modes: Numeric field appends instead of replacing, producing wrong interval
Forgetting to select end condition leaves it as Never
Confusing two identical letter buttons (e.g., two 'T' for Tue/Thu)
verification_checklist: Editor summary line accurately reflects interval, days, and end condition

categories.name: SEARCH_OR_FILTER
categories.precondition: On a screen that exposes a search/filter affordance
abstract_steps: Open the search/filter dialog
Enter the query string
Toggle option flags (case sensitivity, regex, scope, stop-after-first) as required
Note that some options only appear once a parent option is enabled
Execute the search and inspect results
failure_modes: Treating regex metacharacters as literals (or vice versa) due to wrong flag state
Submit gestures passing through dialog to background triggering unexpected popups
Required option hidden behind a parent toggle
verification_checklist: Query and option flags reflect the request
Match count or filtered list confirms expected scope
Empty-result indicator distinguishes 'no match' from dialog dismissal

categories.name: FIND_AND_REPLACE
categories.precondition: Entry is open in an editor that supports find/replace
abstract_steps: Open the search dialog and transition to the replace variant if separate
Enter the find pattern and replacement string in their respective fields
Configure regex/multiline flags as required, escaping characters appropriately
Verify a positive match count before executing
Execute replace-all and inspect the document
failure_modes: Match count remains zero because of regex flag mismatch or empty target
Dialog closes unexpectedly due to misplaced taps; pattern is typed into the document instead
verification_checklist: Replacement is visible in the rendered/raw content
No occurrences of the original pattern remain (for replace-all)
Document saved if persistence is required

categories.name: TOGGLE_VIEW_MODE
categories.precondition: Entry is open in an editor that has edit/preview modes
abstract_steps: Tap the mode-toggle control
Confirm the alternate icon appears indicating the new mode
failure_modes: Misidentifying the mode toggle among toolbar icons
verification_checklist: Rendered content is visible when in preview
Toggle icon now offers the inverse action

categories.name: EXPORT_OR_PRINT
abstract_steps: Open the overflow menu and choose Print/Export
Select destination (e.g., Save as PDF)
Adjust output options after destination is set
Trigger save and confirm in file dialog
failure_modes: Output options remain disabled until destination is selected
Multiple rapid taps on save button may re-open creation flows after return
verification_checklist: File save dialog closes successfully
Returned to the originating screen
